prompt: Use the image just shown as the visual reference for Dusty Rodd. Create a square 2D game sprite sheet with exactly 4 equal cells arranged as a 2x2 grid, read top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right. No visible grid lines, no borders, no labels, no text. Subject: Dusty Rodd, the exact same stocky cheerful side-view miner from the reference, facing right in every cell. Preserve identity and style exactly: stocky body, same face and eyes, same horseshoe mustache, cream shirt, brown gloves and boots, denim-blue overalls #3fa7ff with bib and straps, yellow hard hat with lantern #ffd24a, warm lantern gold, 1px dark outline #141019, flat 2-3 step 16-bit pixel-art shading, crisp arcade silhouette. Action: side-view jump phases in order. Top-left: crouch anticipation with knees bent and arms tucked, boots still on the same lower anchor line. Top-right: rising lift-off with boots just above the anchor, arms swinging up. Bottom-left: apex, compact body high and slightly tucked, lantern angled upward. Bottom-right: falling, body descending with boots below the apex and arms bracing. Body-only sprite: no pickaxe, no detached dust, no impact marks, no floating effects. Keep the character centered in each cell, full body inside the central 60-70% safe area, consistent body height matching the idle reference within 10%, no limbs or hat crossing cell edges, leave solid magenta margin on all four sides. Background must be 100% solid flat #FF00FF magenta with no gradient and no shadow.
